result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 11:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.cre...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(new_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE COALESCE(new_owner,'') <> ''
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE COALESCE(old_owner,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(new_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE COALESCE(new_owner,'') <> ''
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE COALESCE(old_owner,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00' AS start_ts, TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS end_ts
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(new_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE COALESCE(new_owner,'') <> ''
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE COALESCE(old_owner,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00' AS start_ts, TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS end_ts
),
base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS current_owner
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
),
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
handled AS (
  SELECT current_owner AS agent_id FROM base_cases WHERE current_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id FROM owner_hist WHERE new_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id FROM owner_hist WHERE old_owner <> ''
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_hist
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00' AS start_ts, TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS end_ts
),
base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS current_owner
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
),
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
handled AS (
  SELECT current_owner AS agent_id FROM base_cases WHERE current_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id FROM owner_hist WHERE new_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id FROM owner_hist WHERE old_owner <> ''
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_hist
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
